positive: A whimsical, stylized pattern featuring groups of woodland creatures—foxes, deer, raccoons, and owls—interacting playfully within a vibrant, stylized forest setting. The composition should be tightly packed, utilizing negative space effectively to form an all-over, seamless repeating pattern. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes with thick outlines, inspired by mid-century modern illustration and enamel pin designs. Use a muted, earthy color palette with pops of bright jewel tones (teal, burnt orange, moss green) for contrast. The style must be vector art, graphic illustration, perfect for screen printing on clothing, high contrast, clean lines, symmetrical balance, centrally composed.
negative: blur, noisy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, grainy, low detail, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic, photograph, low resolution, grayscale, jpeg artifacts
